title: Lock.Boot _stage2 metadata
description: The `_stage2` block of a Lock.Boot instance's user-data: how stage1 admits and runs the stage2 payload. stage1 reads only `_stage2`; a full user-data document may also carry `_stage1` (stage0's UKI-admission format, specified separately and http-only). Runtime parsing ignores unknown keys; this schema is stricter to catch authoring mistakes.

_stage1.description: stage0's UKI-admission config (separate schema, http-only, single url). Ignored by stage1.

stage2Config.description: Per-architecture stage2 admission config, plus shared inline args.

args.description: Inline argv passed to stage2. Overridden by verified args_url in ed25519 mode.

url.description: http(s):// URL, printable ASCII (no spaces or control characters).

urlOrList.description: A single URL, or a non-empty fallback list tried in order.

archConfig.description: How stage1 admits the stage2 payload for one architecture. Exactly one of `sha256` (pin an exact payload) or `ed25519` (pin a release pubkey; payload rolls forward via a detached `.sig`). Every URL field accepts a string or a fallback list; `sig_url`/`args_url`/`args_sig_url` may contain a `{sha256}` placeholder replaced with the payload's hex digest.

sha256.description: Lowercase or uppercase hex SHA-256 of the payload.

ed25519.description: Base64 (standard, padded) of a 32-byte ed25519 public key.
